Package javashooter.controller

Class CollisionAware4WayController

java.lang.Object
javashooter.controller.ObjectController
javashooter.controller.Simple4WayController
javashooter.controller.CollisionAware4WayController
public class CollisionAware4WayController extends Simple4WayController
This class controls the pacman based on used inputs. It extends the normal javashooter.controller in a) that is detects obstacles and reacts to illegal movements. b) paints the opening and cloisng pacman mouth looking into the right direction Convention: all GameObjects that contain the string "border" are consider obstacles
